title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.1059 - Federal court ordering desegregation court order to govern enrollment option
text:
162.1059.  Federal court ordering desegregation court order to govern enrollment option. — Whenever there is a federal court-ordered desegregation directive for a school district, enrollment options pursuant to sections 162.1040 to 162.1059 are subject to the approval of the court of continuing jurisdiction and the court order shall govern.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1218 § 5)
